name: EvoNB
description: Finetuned ESM2 on ~8 million nanobody sequences from INDI. Validated using molecular dynamics to assess energy change.
capabilities: Finetuned ESM2 on ~8 million nanobody sequences from INDI
Validated using molecular dynamics to assess energy change

seed_sequence.description: Optional nanobody seed sequence to condition generation on

num_sequences.description: Number of nanobody sequences to generate

temperature.description: Sampling temperature controlling diversity vs conservation
